_attribution: LA FORJA team (Manuel Peña Zúñiga). Original item authored by the team.
stem: The daily high temperatures (in degrees Celsius) recorded over six days were 12, 47, 33, 8, 51, 29. What is the range of this dataset?
options: 43 — the difference obtained by subtracting the minimum value (8) from the maximum value (51) in the dataset
author_rationale: The range is the largest value minus the smallest: 51 - 8 = 43, which is option B. The underlying computation is correct and unambiguous.

intended_defect.description: The correct option (B) is written as a long explanatory sentence while the three distractors are bare numbers. The conspicuous length of the keyed option leaks the answer to a test-taker who never computes the range.
intended_defect.expected_finding: The reviewer should flag that option B is far longer and more detailed than the distractors, a length cue that identifies the key independently of the mathematics, even though 43 is in fact the correct range.
